task_completion.description: Create the main Dunning Plan with the correct name, description, and sequential setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Dunning Plan record is visible with Name 'Standard Collections', Description 'Three-level dunning plan for overdue AR invoices', and the 'Create levels sequentially' checkbox enabled.

task_completion.description: Configure Level 1 (Friendly Reminder) with 30 days after due and no fees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Dunning Level record with Name and Print Name 'Friendly Reminder', 'Days after due' set to 30, 'Days between dunning' set to 0, 'Fee' set to 0, 'Show All Due' checked, and 'Show Not Due' unchecked.

task_completion.description: Configure Level 2 (Urgent Notice) with 60 days after due and a 25.00 fee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Dunning Level record with Name and Print Name 'Urgent Notice', 'Days after due' set to 60, 'Days between dunning' set to 30, 'Fee' set to 25.00, 'Show All Due' checked, and 'Show Not Due' unchecked.

task_completion.description: Configure Level 3 (Final Demand) with 90 days after due, a 50.00 fee, and 1.5% interest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Dunning Level record with Name and Print Name 'Final Demand', 'Days after due' set to 90, 'Days between dunning' set to 30, 'Fee' set to 50.00, 'Interest Percent' set to 1.5, 'Show All Due' checked, and 'Show Not Due' unchecked.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the dunning plan and levels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success messages, saved record indicators, or the presence of the records in a list/grid view within the iDempiere interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the plan details into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual ERP system's input fields, not a notepad, text editor, or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Dunning Plan named 'Standard Collections' with exactly 3 levels in iDempiere. Level 1 ('Friendly Reminder'): 30 days after due, 0 days between, 0 fee, 0 interest. Level 2 ('Urgent Notice'): 60 days after due, 30 days between, 25 fee, 0 interest. Level 3 ('Final Demand'): 90 days after due, 30 days between, 50 fee, 1.5 interest. All levels must have 'Show All Due' enabled and 'Show Not Due' disabled.
